operations.name: gate-classify
operations.trigger: new session in a repo; first cd into a new project; post-merge inflection
operations.decision_rule: Run 3 pre-gate commands (git log/git ls-files/ls) + 5 gate questions (size, public-API, familiarity, change-scope, conventions). Map answers via R2 decision tree to one of {greenfield, brownfield-large, mid-size-familiar, library-SDK}.

operations.name: greenfield-strategy
operations.decision_rule: Tool: Claude Code / Cursor / pure-LLM-chat. NOT Aider (repo-map empty). Primitive: prefer scaffolder (create-next-app, cargo new, uv init, cookiecutter) before LM file generation. Autonomy: medium-high; let LM emit multi-file skeletons. Commit every ~10 files generated.
operations.anti_pattern: Spending the first 30 minutes configuring Aider + CONVENTIONS.md + repo-map for an empty repo.

operations.name: brownfield-large-strategy
operations.decision_rule: Tool: Aider (repo-map is the unlock) or Claude Code (long-context fallback). Primitive: symbol index / tree-sitter / ctags. Pattern: /ask first to locate, /add 2-5 files <25k tokens, /code after. Autonomy: low; approve each edit. Requires CONVENTIONS.md; write one if absent.
operations.budget: 2-5 files /add, <25k tokens of code context (aider edit-errors threshold)
operations.evidence_cite: aider.chat/2024/05/22/swe-bench-lite.html (70.3% file-hit with repo-map); aider edit-errors troubleshooting

operations.name: mid-size-familiar-strategy
operations.decision_rule: Tool: Aider --architect or Claude Code. Pre-load exact files (no repo-map fishing). /read CONVENTIONS.md. /ask design then /code. Single-commit, 1-3 file scope.
operations.anti_pattern: Loading repo-map when you already know the 3 files to touch — wastes context budget.
operations.evidence_cite: aider-sop SKILL.md Phase 4 architect; aider conventions doc

operations.name: library-sdk-strategy
operations.decision_rule: Tool: Aider --auto-test or Claude Code with test runner in loop. Primitive: test-fix loop + docstring generation. Any public-API change requires CHANGELOG entry, docstring, semver check; breaking change requires deprecation path. Autonomy: low for public surface, medium for internals.
operations.anti_pattern: Treating as ordinary brownfield: 'random refactor' that breaks downstream consumers.
operations.evidence_cite: aider lint-test docs; aider conventions for API-style pinning

operations.name: state-reclassify
operations.trigger: 1 week since last gate AND repo doubled; new contributor joined; v0.1.0 published; agent picked wrong tool twice in a row
operations.decision_rule: Re-run op-1; if state label changes, rewrite the [repo-state: ...] line and switch strategy starting next task.

operations.name: cross-repo-multi-state
operations.trigger: monorepo; multi-package repo; subtree differs from root
operations.decision_rule: Don't gate the whole tree. cd into each working subdirectory and run op-1 there. Each subdirectory carries its own [repo-state: ...] line. Agent switches strategy on cd. For Aider: --subtree-only; for Claude Code: cwd discipline.

operations.name: state-mismatch-rescue
operations.trigger: you're 10 min into a session and tool keeps misfiring (hallucinated paths, repo-map empty, conventions ignored)
operations.decision_rule: Stop. /clear (or open new session). Re-run op-1. Restart with the correct state's strategy. Sunk-cost is sub-30 minutes; persisting with wrong state costs hours.
operations.anti_pattern: Pushing through with wrong state assumption because 'I'm already set up'.

avoid: Cursor full-index when index goes stale
heavy repo-map (you already know the files)

library-SDK.context_budget: scoped per public symbol; CHANGELOG entry mandatory
